mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Users ( nickname, email, password, profile_path, reg_date, role ) VALUES ( #{nickname}, #{email}, #{password}, #{profilePath}, #{regDate}, #{role} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname, email, password, profile_path AS profilePath, reg_date AS regDate, role FROM Users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, nickname, email, password, profile_path AS profilePath, reg_date AS regDate, role FROM Users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, nickname, email, password, profile_path AS profilePath, reg_date AS regDate, role FROM Users
mapper.update: UPDATE Users SET nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, profile_path = #{profilePath}, password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.board_id AS boardId, b.title AS title, c.content AS content, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM Comments c JOIN Boards b ON c.board_id = b.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT b.id AS boardId, b.title AS title, b.content AS content, b.created_at AS createdAt FROM Board_Like bl JOIN Boards b ON bl.board_id = b.id WHERE bl.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
SELECT h.tag_name FROM User_Hashtag uh JOIN Hashtag h ON uh.hashtag_id = h.id WHERE uh.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY h.id
